definition: 1 if HH has at least one migrant (internal or overseas).
1 if HH has at least one migrant within Nepal.
1 if HH has at least one migrant abroad.
Total migrants from this HH.
Number of international migrants.
Count of male migrants.
Count of female migrants.
Mean age of migrants at survey. NA if no migrants.
Mean months since first leaving, capped at 600. NA if no migrants.
1 if any migrant moved for 'look for work' or 'start new job/business'.
1 if any migrant moved for education or training.
1 if any migrant moved for marriage, to follow family, or family reasons.
1 if any migrant moved due to natural disaster.
Share of international migrants in India. NA if no international migrants.
Share in Gulf countries: Qatar, Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman (s11q02b + s11q02d free-text in 2018).

1 if any migrant sent remittance in past 12 months.
Total remittance received (Rs.) across all migrants.

Mean frequency of remittance sends per year, across migrants who sent (capped at 12 = monthly; excludes '998' don't-know).
1 if any migrant used bank / IME (formal channel).
1 if any migrant used hundi (informal transfer).
1 if remittance used for non-durable consumption or ceremonies.
1 if remittance used for education costs.
1 if remittance used for health costs.
1 if remittance used for productive investment (business inputs/equipment, land, livestock, other business).
